mapper.select:
SELECT c.contract_type AS contractType, c.contract_no AS contractNo, c.products_name AS productsName, c.business_type AS businessType, c.company_name AS companyName, c.total_number AS totalNumber, c.total_amount AS totalAmount, (c.dealed_amount - c.refund_amount) AS dealedAmount, c.contract_status AS contractStatus, c.pay_full_time AS payFullTime, c.pay_bond_time AS payBondTime, c.contract_time AS contractTime, c.match_user_name AS matchUserName, c.our_company_name AS ourCompanyName, c.source As source, IF(c.pay_bond_time IS NULL,'A',IF((CURDATE()<=c.pay_bond_time AND (c.dealed_amount-c.refund_amount)<=c.pay_bond_time),'D',IF((CURDATE()>c.pay_bond_time AND CURDATE()<=c.pay_full_time AND (c.dealed_amount-c.refund_amount)<c.total_amount),'A',IF((CURDATE()>c.pay_full_time AND (c.dealed_amount-c.refund_amount)<c.total_amount),'W','E')))) AS shouldPayType, IF(c.pay_bond_time IS NULL,(c.total_amount-c.dealed_amount+c.refund_amount),IF((CURDATE()<=c.pay_bond_time AND (c.dealed_amount-c.refund_amount)<=c.pay_bond_time),(c.bond_amount-c.dealed_amount+c.refund_amount),IF((CURDATE()>c.pay_bond_time AND CURDATE()<=c.pay_full_time AND (c.dealed_amount-c.refund_amount)<c.total_amount),(c.total_amount-c.dealed_amount+c.refund_amount),IF((CURDATE()>c.pay_full_time AND (c.dealed_amount-c.refund_amount)<c.total_amount),(c.total_amount-c.dealed_amount+c.refund_amount),'0')))) AS shouldAmount, IF(c.pay_bond_time IS NULL,c.pay_full_time,IF((CURDATE()<=c.pay_bond_time AND (c.dealed_amount-c.refund_amount)<=c.pay_bond_time),c.pay_bond_time,IF((CURDATE()>c.pay_bond_time AND CURDATE()<=c.pay_full_time AND (c.dealed_amount-c.refund_amount)<c.total_amount),c.pay_full_time,IF((CURDATE()>c.pay_full_time AND (c.dealed_amount-c.refund_amount)<c.total_amount),c.pay_full_time,c.pay_full_time)))) AS shouldPayDate FROM t_ctr_contract AS c WHERE c.contract_type = 'B' AND c.total_amount != (c.dealed_amount - c.refund_amount) AND c.contract_status != 'C' AND c.enterprise_id = #{enterpriseId} AND (IF(c.pay_bond_time IS NULL,(c.total_amount-c.dealed_amount+c.refund_amount),IF((CURDATE()<=c.pay_bond_time AND (c.dealed_amount-c.refund_amount)<=c.pay_bond_time),(c.bond_amount-c.dealed_amount+c.refund_amount),IF((CURDATE()>c.pay_bond_time AND CURDATE()<=c.pay_full_time AND (c.dealed_amount-c.refund_amount)<c.total_amount),(c.total_amount-c.dealed_amount+c.refund_amount),IF((CURDATE()>c.pay_full_time AND (c.dealed_amount-c.refund_amount)<c.total_amount),(c.total_amount-c.dealed_amount+c.refund_amount),'0'))))) > 0
AND DATE_FORMAT(IF(c.pay_bond_time IS NULL,c.pay_full_time,IF((CURDATE()<=c.pay_bond_time AND (c.dealed_amount-c.refund_amount)<=c.pay_bond_time),c.pay_bond_time,IF((CURDATE()>c.pay_bond_time AND CURDATE()<=c.pay_full_time AND (c.dealed_amount-c.refund_amount)<c.total_amount),c.pay_full_time,IF((CURDATE()>c.pay_full_time AND (c.dealed_amount-c.refund_amount)<c.total_amount),c.pay_full_time,c.pay_full_time)))), '%Y-%m-%d') >= DATE_FORMAT(#{beginTime}, '%Y-%m-%d')
AND DATE_FORMAT(IF(c.pay_bond_time IS NULL,c.pay_full_time,IF((CURDATE()<=c.pay_bond_time AND (c.dealed_amount-c.refund_amount)<=c.pay_bond_time),c.pay_bond_time,IF((CURDATE()>c.pay_bond_time AND CURDATE()<=c.pay_full_time AND (c.dealed_amount-c.refund_amount)<c.total_amount),c.pay_full_time,IF((CURDATE()>c.pay_full_time AND (c.dealed_amount-c.refund_amount)<c.total_amount),c.pay_full_time,c.pay_full_time)))), '%Y-%m-%d') < DATE_ADD(DATE_FORMAT(#{endTime}, '%Y-%m-%d'),INTERVAL 1 DAY)
AND IF(c.pay_bond_time IS NULL,'A',IF((CURDATE()<=c.pay_bond_time AND (c.dealed_amount-c.refund_amount)<=c.pay_bond_time),'D',IF((CURDATE()>c.pay_bond_time AND CURDATE()<=c.pay_full_time AND (c.dealed_amount-c.refund_amount)<c.total_amount),'A',IF((CURDATE()>c.pay_full_time AND (c.dealed_amount-c.refund_amount)<c.total_amount),'W','E')))) = #{shouldPayType}
ORDER BY c.contract_time DESC
ORDER BY c.contract_time ASC
ORDER BY c.contract_time DESC

SELECT SUM(ROUND(c.total_number,2)) AS totalNumber, SUM(ROUND(c.total_amount,2)) AS totalAmount, SUM(ROUND((c.dealed_amount - c.refund_amount),2)) AS dealedAmount, SUM(ROUND(IF(c.pay_bond_time IS NULL,(c.total_amount-c.dealed_amount+c.refund_amount),IF((CURDATE()<=c.pay_bond_time AND (c.dealed_amount-c.refund_amount)<=c.pay_bond_time),(c.bond_amount-c.dealed_amount+c.refund_amount),IF((CURDATE()>c.pay_bond_time AND CURDATE()<=c.pay_full_time AND (c.dealed_amount-c.refund_amount)<c.total_amount),(c.total_amount-c.dealed_amount+c.refund_amount),IF((CURDATE()>c.pay_full_time AND (c.dealed_amount-c.refund_amount)<c.total_amount),(c.total_amount-c.dealed_amount+c.refund_amount),'0')))),2)) AS shouldAmount FROM t_ctr_contract AS c WHERE c.contract_type = 'B' AND c.total_amount != (c.dealed_amount - c.refund_amount) AND c.contract_status != 'C' AND c.enterprise_id = #{enterpriseId} AND (IF(c.pay_bond_time IS NULL,(c.total_amount-c.dealed_amount+c.refund_amount),IF((CURDATE()<=c.pay_bond_time AND (c.dealed_amount-c.refund_amount)<=c.pay_bond_time),(c.bond_amount-c.dealed_amount+c.refund_amount),IF((CURDATE()>c.pay_bond_time AND CURDATE()<=c.pay_full_time AND (c.dealed_amount-c.refund_amount)<c.total_amount),(c.total_amount-c.dealed_amount+c.refund_amount),IF((CURDATE()>c.pay_full_time AND (c.dealed_amount-c.refund_amount)<c.total_amount),(c.total_amount-c.dealed_amount+c.refund_amount),'0'))))) > 0
AND DATE_FORMAT(IF(c.pay_bond_time IS NULL,c.pay_full_time,IF((CURDATE()<=c.pay_bond_time AND (c.dealed_amount-c.refund_amount)<=c.pay_bond_time),c.pay_bond_time,IF((CURDATE()>c.pay_bond_time AND CURDATE()<=c.pay_full_time AND (c.dealed_amount-c.refund_amount)<c.total_amount),c.pay_full_time,IF((CURDATE()>c.pay_full_time AND (c.dealed_amount-c.refund_amount)<c.total_amount),c.pay_full_time,c.pay_full_time)))), '%Y-%m-%d') >= DATE_FORMAT(#{beginTime}, '%Y-%m-%d')
AND DATE_FORMAT(IF(c.pay_bond_time IS NULL,c.pay_full_time,IF((CURDATE()<=c.pay_bond_time AND (c.dealed_amount-c.refund_amount)<=c.pay_bond_time),c.pay_bond_time,IF((CURDATE()>c.pay_bond_time AND CURDATE()<=c.pay_full_time AND (c.dealed_amount-c.refund_amount)<c.total_amount),c.pay_full_time,IF((CURDATE()>c.pay_full_time AND (c.dealed_amount-c.refund_amount)<c.total_amount),c.pay_full_time,c.pay_full_time)))), '%Y-%m-%d') < DATE_ADD(DATE_FORMAT(#{endTime}, '%Y-%m-%d'),INTERVAL 1 DAY)
AND IF(c.pay_bond_time IS NULL,'A',IF((CURDATE()<=c.pay_bond_time AND (c.dealed_amount-c.refund_amount)<=c.pay_bond_time),'D',IF((CURDATE()>c.pay_bond_time AND CURDATE()<=c.pay_full_time AND (c.dealed_amount-c.refund_amount)<c.total_amount),'A',IF((CURDATE()>c.pay_full_time AND (c.dealed_amount-c.refund_amount)<c.total_amount),'W','E')))) = #{shouldPayType}

SELECT c.id AS id, c.contract_type AS contractType, c.contract_no AS contractNo, c.products_name AS productsName, c.business_type AS businessType, c.company_name AS companyName, c.total_number AS totalNumber, c.total_amount AS totalAmount, c.delivery_mode AS deliveryMode, (c.dealed_amount-c.refund_amount) AS dealedAmount, c.total_amount-dealed_amount AS shouldAmount, c.contract_status AS contractStatus, c.pay_full_time AS payFullTime, c.pay_bond_time AS payBondTime, c.contract_time AS contractTime, c.match_user_name AS matchUserName, c.our_company_name AS ourCompanyName, c.warehouse_number AS warehouseNumber, a.real_warehose_date AS realWarehoseDate, c.confirm_receive_number AS confirmReceiveNumber, c.confirm_date AS confirmDate, a.apply_pay_amount AS receiveAmount, a.real_pay_date AS receiveDate, c.source FROM t_ctr_contract AS c LEFT JOIN t_ctr_contract_apply a on c.id=a.ctr_contract_id WHERE c.contract_type = 'S' AND c.total_amount != c.dealed_amount AND c.contract_status != 'C' AND c.contract_status != 'B' AND c.enterprise_id = #{enterpriseId}
ORDER BY c.contract_time DESC
ORDER BY c.contract_time ASC
ORDER BY c.contract_time DESC

SELECT SUM(c.total_number) AS sumTotalNumber, SUM(c.total_amount) AS sumTotalAmount, SUM(c.warehouse_number) AS sumWarehouseNumber, SUM(c.confirm_receive_number) AS sumConfirmReceiveNumber, SUM(c.dealed_amount) AS sumReceiveAmount, SUM(c.dealed_amount) AS sumDealedAmount, SUM(c.total_amount-dealed_amount ) AS sumShouldAmount FROM t_ctr_contract AS c WHERE c.contract_type = 'S' AND c.total_amount != c.dealed_amount AND c.contract_status != 'C' AND c.enterprise_id = #{enterpriseId}
ORDER BY c.contract_time DESC
ORDER BY c.contract_time ASC
ORDER BY c.contract_time DESC
